edition: K.S. Āgāśe, *Bṛhadāraṇyaka-Upaniṣad-Bhāṣya-Vārttikam of Sureśvarācārya with the Śāstra-Prakāśikā of Ānandagiri*, Ānandāśrama Sanskrit Series No. 16, 3 vols., Pune, 1892–1893 (reprinted 1937). Single PDF item bundles all three volumes.
commentaries_included: Śaṅkara's Bṛhadāraṇyaka-Bhāṣya (the base text Sureśvara is vārttika-ing)

expected_text_units.source_for_estimate: Sureśvara's BUBV has 11,550 vārttikas (Hiriyanna count); 968-page PDF aligns

ground_truth_source: A.J. Alston, *Realisation of the Absolute* (8 vols, Shanti Sadan 1989–1996) — full English vehicle, secondhand only; partial GRETIL fragments.
first_page_visual_quality_notes: Heuristic (KB/page ~52): low-bitrate JPEG2000 compression — typical of Adobe Acrobat 9.0 Image Conversion archive uploads. The KB/page proxy under-reads quality here; Anandashram 1892 typesetting is renowned for clarity. Expect *legible* scan despite small file size.
ocr_friendliness_notes: Three commentaries (Śaṅkara mūla-bhāṣya, Sureśvara vārttika, Ānandagiri ṭīkā) on a single page is the *worst* region-segmentation challenge in the priority-12. Reference: Anandashram three-column format with vārttika numbering. Will require trained layout model.
